steps.title: Use the shift rule
steps.content: Set B adds $14\mu\text{F}$ to every capacitor in set A. Adding the same amount to every data value increases the mean by that amount but leaves the range unchanged.

steps.title: Update the mean
steps.content: From the dot plot, set A has mean $10\mu\text{F}$ and range $12\mu\text{F}$. Therefore, set B has mean $$10\mu\text{F}+14\mu\text{F}=24\mu\text{F}$$ and range $12\mu\text{F}$. The answer is C.
